description: A builder template for turning a presentation topic into a structured outline with supporting knowledge and traceable planning steps.
default_query: Prepare a 15-minute presentation outline about Harness Engineering and Multi-Agent Workflow Builder MVP.

node_palette.name: Presentation Request Parser Node
node_palette.role: Extract presentation topic, target duration and expected output from the user request.

node_palette.name: Presentation Question Node
node_palette.role: Ask for the missing presentation topic before planning.

node_palette.name: Topic Analysis Node
node_palette.role: Identify relevant concepts and decide which knowledge notes are needed.

node_palette.name: Knowledge Lookup Node
node_palette.role: Load local knowledge notes for the matched presentation topics.

node_palette.name: Outline Generation Node
node_palette.role: Create a section-by-section presentation outline from the topic and knowledge notes.

node_palette.name: Presentation Compose Node
node_palette.role: Render the final outline with evidence points and execution trace.

clarification_questions.topic: Please provide the presentation topic before generating an outline.
